sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Update Operational State for the EV Box in the databse using the JDBC probe.
Update Operational State for the EV Box in the databse using the JDBC probe.
After Incident closure via 'Resolved by request' put additional info for the engineer in the work notes

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Update Operational State for the EV Box in the databse using the JDBC probe.
After Incident closure via 'Resolved by request' put additional info for the engineer in the work notes
Update Operational State for the EV Box in the databse using the JDBC probe.
